---
title: "Page not found"
page-layout: full
---

:::{.hero}
## 404

The page you're looking for isn't here. This might happen if a link changed or if the URL is slightly off.

::: {.hero-meta}
::: {.hero-chip}
[← Back to Home](/)
:::
::: {.hero-chip}
[Research themes](/research.qmd)
:::
::: {.hero-chip}
[Publications](/publications.qmd)
:::
:::
:::

## What you might find helpful

- **[Research](/research.qmd)** — Research themes and scientific questions
- **[Publications](/publications.qmd)** — Papers, preprints, and conference presentations
- **[Projects](/projects.qmd)** — Active and completed project pages
- **[Resources](/resources.qmd)** — Code, data, protocols, and teaching materials
- **[Contact](/contact.qmd)** — Get in touch
